item.title: Happy Year of the Dragon!
item.description:
Years of the Dragon include 2036, 2024, 2012, 2000, 1988, 1976, 1964, 1952...
People born in Dragon years usually possess natural courage, tenacity, and intelligence, often displaying enthusiasm and confidence.
2024 is the Year of the Wood Dragon, beginning on February 10th, 2024 (Chinese New Year) and concluding on January 28th, 2025 (Chinese New Year's Eve).
The Dragon as a Yang Earth sign possesses resilience and confidence, and are “naturally lucky and successful” due to their intelligence and strong intuition.
In Chinese culture, the Dragon holds a significant place as an auspicious and extraordinary creature, unparalleled in talent and excellence. It symbolizes power, nobility, honor, luck, and success. 2024 is forecasted to bring about opportunities, changes, and challenges. If you're seeking a shift in your current lives, this year might offer a favorable chance.
item.dc:creator: hanmerhack

item.title: LGBTQ members and onlookers chase and beat down armed terrorist.
item.description:
On 25 June 2022, the night before the annual pride parade. two people were killed, and twenty-one wounded in a mass shooting near a popular LGBTQ+ venue in Oslo. The islamic extremist (yellow shirt) was armed with an mp40 submachinegun and a sidearm. When the terrorist suffered a misfire, a patron tackled him, which made him drop his main firearm. This was followed by other people pursuing the terrorist, and ended with him pinned down on the side of the street, as can be seen in the video. The police formally cancelled the pride parade due to increased threat levels.
Despite this, hundreds of people marched in Oslo, chanting: "We're here, we're queer, we won't disappear!" the morning after. Bjarne Finsrud, the patron who first attacked the terrorist, is scheduled to receive the Norwegian medal of noble deed in gold.
item.dc:creator: TheAnswerWasAlwaysMoreLube

item.title: It's ok to laugh. It's weird, I think sometimes we forget it's ok to be happy while we're struggling.
item.description: So, like, laugh and stuff. Or at stuff. But not at folks, unless they're, ya know what? Just live your lives. https://www.gofundme.com/f/work-and-personal-clothes-and-shoes-etc?utm_source=customer&utm_medium=copy_link&utm_campaign=p_lico+share-sheet Sorry :( you may see a shameless plug, but trust me. There's plenty of shame there. Feel free to ignore it, just thought I'd leave it there.

item.title: Dogs are the best people.
item.description: This is Dodger. He's a guide dog for his human Roland Croteau, a blind senior in British Columbia. The duo found themselves stranded after one cab driver refused to pick them up, citing an allergy, and a second one ultimately dropped them off at the wrong house. Fortunately, Dodger was ready to step up, guiding Roland safely back home. The cab company, Vernon Taxi, has offered free rides to Croteau and said it'll use this unfortunate opportunity to retrain its staff.
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Some programming humor for a niche audience
item.description:
1
2
3. Now what?!
4
5. How to get a date as a programmer
6
7. Yeah, your random ideas are special
8
9
10
11
12
13
14. Start Googling today kid and in 10 years you will be there
15. And finally I would like to share something awesome from myself. I've been working very hard (in the past year or so months) on "Stanley Parable"-like game with a touch of GladOS from "Portal". If you happen to be a gaming fan, please wishlist. The demo is part of Steam Next Fest: : ) A guy on Discord said it is good, and my mom said you should try it, best thing she played since Super Mario (and only thing) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great Sunday!
